zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Sully於大約1080年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特素利-素-洛易時，她的父親Lord of Sully Gilon II32歲，母親Eldeberge Bourges32歲。她於大約1094年與Guillaume de Blois在法國艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1137年3月8日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Sully was born about 1080, in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Lord of Sully Gilon II, was 32 and her mother, Eldeberge Bourges, was 32. She married Guillaume de Blois about 1094, in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 8 March 1137, in Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Sully est née environ 1080, à Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Lord of Sully Gilon II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eldeberge Bourges, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Blois environ 1094, à Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1137, à Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Sully um 1080 in Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord of Sully Gilon II 32 und ihre Mutter Eldeberge Bourges 32. Sie hat um 1094 in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich Guillaume de Blois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. März 1137 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Sully è nata il circa 1080 nel Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, sua padre, Lord of Sully Gilon II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eldeberge Bourges, aveva 32 anni. ko.Sully-Sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val De L: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Sully(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 설리-수-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord of Sully Gilon II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eldeberge Bourges(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1094년 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 처트레스에서 Guillaume de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1137년 3월 8일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Sully nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Lord of Sully Gilon II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eldeberge Bourges, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Blois aproximadamente 1094, em Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1137, em Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 58 anos.

ru.France, Centre, Sully-sur-Loire: сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Sully родилась около 1080 г. в местности сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Lord of Sully Gilon II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eldeberge Bourges, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Blois около 1094 г. в местности чартресь, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 8 марта 1137 г. в местности саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

Se casó con Guillaume de Blois aproximadamente 1094, en Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1137, en Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
